revision.comment: Yes it is over-engineered, but it is compatible with the other namespace detection templates.
Protected Template:Main other: This is a meta-template, the moment it is used it becomes high-risk. [edit=sysop:move=sysop]
Added {{pp-template|small=yes}}.
Removing the "return 'main'/'other' when no parameter" function, since not used, not needed and causes problems in some situations.
